Who I Am

Profile

Dynamic and results-driven professional with extensive experience leading Asia Pacific Professional Affairs and Education strategies within the optometry and ophthalmology sectors. I possess a solid understanding of optometry, ophthalmology clinical practices, and the optical retail business.

I have successfully managed cross-cultural teams, developing professionals including optometrists, ophthalmologists, and orthoptists in professional education & development.

I have a proven track record of shaping the professional landscape by driving eye health strategies, contact lens and myopia management Standard of Care — through collaborations with key professional associations, academic institutions, and practitioners.

My role involves strategizing end-to-end professional programs aligned with business objectives and executing them through partnership with in-market Professional Affairs teams.
